  "findings": [
    "Severe, rapid metallic tapping/clacking noise at idle",
    "Frequency of noise is consistent with half engine speed (valvetrain/camshaft speed)",
    "Likely excessive valve clearance, collapsed hydraulic lifter, or timing chain tensioner failure"

  "actions": [
    "Shut down engine immediately to prevent catastrophic valve-to-piston contact",
    "Remove valve cover to inspect camshaft lobes, lifters/rockers, and timing chain slack",
    "Measure valve clearances and check oil pressure to the cylinder head"
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals a loud, rhythmic, high-frequency metallic tapping sound characteristic of a severe valvetrain defect or timing chain slack. Operating the engine in this condition risks catastrophic mechanical failure.",

    "OEM Engine Mechanical Diagnostic Procedures - Valvetrain Noise Diagnosis"
  ]
